name: Ma-po's Pork Brains
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pork brains in boiling water until done. Remove the membrane and tissue.
2. Cut into long, thin slices.
3. Heat oil in a wok. Stir-fry ground pork with Chili Nam Yuey and minced ginger until the ground pork turns crispy. Add stock, pork brains, soy sauce, and wine. Simmer over low heat until there is almost no liquid remaining.
4. Add cornstarch paste and remove from heat. Garnish with sesame oil, ground pepper, and minced spring onions. Enjoy!
5. You can use beef brains instead of pork brains. There is no mention of whether you should use ground beef or pork if you use beef brains.
From The Chinese Regional Cuisine Series, Szechuan Cooking.
Posted by James Lor.
